info.title: Lyceum 157 Hub API
info.description:
REST API for Lyceum 157 Hub — a B2C marketplace where minor students sell
their projects. The platform acts as a Ukrainian sole-proprietor (FOP) tax
agent: it collects payments via LiqPay, fiscalizes via Checkbox PRRO,
withholds PDFO 18% + ВЗ 1.5%, and pays NET to parents' cards.

**Conventions:**
- Errors follow RFC 7807 `application/problem+json`.
- All mutating endpoints require an `Idempotency-Key` header.
- All money values are in UAH with `DECIMAL(10,2)` precision.
- All timestamps are ISO-8601 UTC.

tags.name: Admin · Tax Report
tags.description: 4DF tax-report CSV export for the accountant. RNOKPP is decrypted on-the-fly per row; every access is recorded in `audit_logs`.

tags.name: Catalog
tags.description: Public, unauthenticated browse over the active product catalog (state = ACTIVE). Cached in Redis for 5 minutes.

tags.name: Student · Products
tags.description: Student-facing product CRUD and image upload (presigned S3). State machine: DRAFT → PENDING_REVIEW → ACTIVE / REJECTED. Only DRAFT and REJECTED allow edits.

tags.name: Orders
tags.description: Public order creation. Requires `Idempotency-Key` header — replays within 24h return the cached response (ADR-005).

tags.name: Admin · Products
tags.description: Product moderation queue. Approval transitions PENDING_REVIEW → ACTIVE; rejection sends a notification with the reason and lets the student edit and resubmit.

tags.name: Admin · Orders
tags.description: Order moderation: refunds (full only — no partial refunds in v1).

tags.name: Webhooks · Vchasno
tags.description: Vchasno → us callback. Authenticated by HMAC-SHA256 signature in `X-Vchasno-Signature` header. Distributed lock per documentId prevents concurrent processing.

tags.name: Webhooks · LiqPay
tags.description: LiqPay → us callback. Authenticated by HMAC signature, NOT JWT. 3-layer idempotency: Redisson lock + DB UNIQUE on `(provider, transaction_id)` + status check (ADR-005).

tags.name: Student · Finance
tags.description: Read-only finance dashboard for the authenticated student.

tags.name: Admin · Payouts
tags.description: Payout execution. Protected by 5 layers: 2FA TOTP → pessimistic lock → Redisson distributed lock → JPA @Version → DB UNIQUE on success.

tags.name: KYC (Parent)
tags.description: Parent verification flow: a single-use magic-link token (sent by email when the student registers) authenticates the parent. Submitting RNOKPP and a card triggers Vchasno e-signature.

tags.name: Admin · 2FA
tags.description: TOTP-based 2nd factor enrollment and verification. Required before any payout execution.

tags.name: Auth
tags.description: Student registration, login, JWT refresh, logout. The refresh token is stored as an HttpOnly Strict-SameSite cookie scoped to /api/v1/auth.

put.summary: Edit a DRAFT or REJECTED product
put.description: PENDING_REVIEW and ACTIVE products are immutable — they must first be hidden, then a new version drafted.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

404.description: Product not found or not owned by this student

delete.description: Sets deleted_at timestamp; product becomes invisible. Pending orders stay linked. Hard-delete is admin-only.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

post.summary: Vchasno e-signature status callback
post.description: Fires when a parent has completed (or rejected) the e-signature flow. Approved consents activate the LegalConsent record and unblock product publication for the student.

parameters.name: X-Vchasno-Signature
parameters.description: HMAC-SHA256 signature of the raw body

400.description: Malformed payload

post.summary: LiqPay payment-status callback
post.description: Body is `application/x-www-form-urlencoded` with two fields: `data` and `signature`. Signature is `Base64(SHA1(private_key + data + private_key))`. Returns 200 on success or unrecoverable error to avoid LiqPay retry storms; 503 only for transient failures.

400.description: Malformed payload

post.summary: Create a DRAFT product
post.description: Title is OWASP-sanitized; description allows safe HTML. Slug is generated from title + 8-char UUID suffix.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

post.summary: Restore a HIDDEN product to ACTIVE

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

post.summary: Submit a draft for admin review
post.description: Transitions DRAFT → PENDING_REVIEW. Requires the parent's KYC to be APPROVED and at least one product image confirmed.

409.description: Not in DRAFT state, KYC missing, or no images

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

post.summary: Step 1/2 — request a presigned S3 upload URL
post.description: Returns a one-time PUT URL valid for 5 minutes. Client uploads the file directly to S3, then calls /images/confirm.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

post.summary: Step 2/2 — confirm a successful S3 upload
post.description: Reads the first 64 bytes from S3 and verifies the file's magic bytes match the declared MIME type. Mismatched files are deleted from S3.

415.description: Magic-byte signature does not match declared MIME type

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

post.summary: Hide an ACTIVE product
post.description: Removes from public catalog without deleting. Reversible via /unhide.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

post.summary: Create a new order and obtain a payment URL
post.description: Acquires pessimistic locks on the affected product rows in sorted-ID order to avoid deadlocks, decrements stock atomically, returns LiqPay redirect URL.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Client-supplied UUID. Replays within 24h return the same response.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

409.description: Insufficient stock or idempotency-key replay with different payload

post.summary: Update parent's payout card
post.description: Used when a parent needs to switch the destination card. Requires a fresh CARD_UPDATE-purpose magic-link token (separate from the initial KYC token).

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

404.description: Token not found, expired, or wrong purpose

post.summary: Submit parent KYC data and trigger Vchasno e-signature
post.description: Atomically: consumes the magic-link token (single-use), encrypts RNOKPP and card via AES-256-GCM, stores the LegalConsent, dispatches Vchasno-sign request. Once Vchasno fires the webhook, the consent becomes APPROVED and the student can publish products.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

404.description: Token not found, expired, or already used

post.summary: Register a student account
post.description: Creates a STUDENT user, dispatches a magic-link consent email to the parent. The student cannot publish products until KYC is complete.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

post.summary: Rotate the refresh token and issue a fresh access token
post.description: Reads the `refresh_token` cookie, invalidates it, and issues a new pair. If the same refresh token is presented twice (replay), all sessions for the user are revoked.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

401.description: Refresh token missing, expired, or replayed

post.summary: Invalidate the current refresh token
post.description: Idempotent — safe to call when the cookie is already gone.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

post.summary: Authenticate and obtain a JWT pair
post.description: Returns an access token (15 min TTL) in the body. The refresh token (7 day TTL) is set as a HttpOnly cookie. Refresh-token reuse is detected and triggers global token revocation.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

post.summary: Reject a product (PENDING_REVIEW → REJECTED)
post.description: Reason is shown to the student so they can fix and resubmit.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

post.summary: Approve a product (PENDING_REVIEW → ACTIVE)
post.description: Generates the public slug, makes product visible in catalog.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

post.summary: Execute a batch of approved payouts (2FA-gated)
post.description: Submits LiqPay B2C payout requests. Each payout transitions APPROVED → PROCESSING. Final status (SUCCESS / FAILED) is set asynchronously by the LiqPay payout webhook.

parameters.name: X-TOTP-Code
parameters.description: Six-digit TOTP code from authenticator app

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

409.description: One or more payouts not in APPROVED state, or already executing

post.summary: Issue a full refund for a paid order
post.description: Calls LiqPay reversal API. Restocks product. If a payout was already executed, the bank fee is not recovered (write-off).

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

post.summary: Verify a TOTP code (does not mutate state)
post.description: Used by the admin UI to validate a code before submitting a sensitive op.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

post.summary: Begin 2FA enrollment — returns QR code + recovery codes
post.description: Generates a fresh TOTP secret bound to the admin account. Account is NOT yet 2FA-enabled — admin must scan the QR and call /confirm with the first valid code.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

post.summary: Confirm 2FA enrollment with the first valid TOTP code
post.description: Marks the admin as 2FA-enabled. Required before any payout execution.

400.description: Invalid or expired TOTP code

get.description: Returns total gross/taxes/net across all approved payouts plus pending hold (within 14-day chargeback window) and pending approved (waiting admin payout execution).

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

get.description: Returns ACTIVE products only; HIDDEN/DRAFT/PENDING_REVIEW are not exposed.

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort order: newest | price_asc | price_desc | popular

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

get.summary: Get a single active product by SEO slug
get.description: Increments view count asynchronously. Returns 404 if not ACTIVE.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

404.description: Slug not found or not ACTIVE

get.summary: Peek at the magic-link session (does not consume the token)
get.description: Used by the parent landing page to display student name + grade before collecting RNOKPP. Token must still be consumed via /parents/submit.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

404.description: Token not found, expired, or wrong purpose

get.description: Defaults to PENDING_REVIEW. Filter via `status`. Includes student name, grade, and KYC-signed flag for context.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

get.summary: Download 4DF CSV report for a date range
get.description: Streams CSV (one row per payout) including parent RNOKPP, gross/PDFO/VZ/net. Filename: `4DF_<from>_<to>.csv`. No-cache headers prevent browser caching of decrypted PII.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

delete.description: Soft-deletes the user, crypto-shreds encrypted PII (RNOKPP, payout card), anonymizes buyer fields on Orders, revokes all refresh tokens. Tax-law-required records (payouts, fiscal_receipts) are kept for 7 years but with PII rendered un-decryptable.

400.description: Bad request — malformed JSON, missing required field

EditProductRequest.description: Edit a DRAFT or REJECTED product. Type and stockQty cannot be changed once set.

stockQty.description: Stock quantity for PHYSICAL products (ignored for DIGITAL)

CreateProductRequest.description: Create a DRAFT product. Title is OWASP-sanitized; HTML in description is sanitized too.

CreatedProductResponse.description: Result of a successful product create — only the new id

UploadImageRequest.description: Request a presigned S3 upload URL for a product image

url.description: Pre-signed PUT URL — upload binary directly to S3

s3Key.description: S3 object key — pass back to /images/confirm

additionalProperties.description: Headers the client must send to S3 (e.g. Content-Type)

requiredHeaders.description: Headers the client must send to S3 (e.g. Content-Type)

expiresAt.description: Absolute expiry time of this URL

PresignedUploadDto.description: One-time presigned S3 PUT URL (valid 5 min)

declaredMimeType.description: Declared MIME type — must match magic-byte signature

primary.description: Mark as primary (thumbnail) for this product

ConfirmImageRequest.description: Confirm a successful S3 upload. Server reads first 64 bytes and verifies magic bytes match declaredMimeType.

CreateOrderRequest.description: Buyer details + cart. The Idempotency-Key header guards against double submissions.

OrderCreationResponse.description: Order created. Buyer should be redirected to `paymentUrl` to complete payment.

CardUpdateRequest.description: Update parent's payout card (Luhn-validated, AES-encrypted at rest)

parentRnokpp.description: Ukrainian RNOKPP (10-digit tax ID, with checksum)

KycSubmitRequest.description: Parent KYC submission. RNOKPP and PAN are AES-256-GCM encrypted at rest, never logged.

signDocumentUrl.description: Vchasno signing URL (null until provider responds)

KycSubmitResponse.description: Status after KYC submission. Vchasno e-signature is dispatched async.

parentEmail.description: Parent email (must be different from student)

RegisterRequest.description: Student account registration. Triggers a magic-link consent email to the parent; the student cannot publish until KYC completes.

RegisterResponse.description: Result of a successful student registration

TokenResponse.description: Access token + caller identity. Refresh token is returned as an HttpOnly cookie, not in this body.

reason.description: Rejection reason (10..500 chars), shown to the student
reason.example: Title is misleading — please describe the actual size and material

RejectProductRequest.description: Rejection feedback shown to the student so they can fix and resubmit

kycSigned.description: Whether parent KYC has been approved (gates publication)

AdminProductDto.description: Admin moderation view of a product (includes student + KYC context)

PayoutBatchRequest.description: Batch of payout UUIDs to execute. Max 200 per call.

processedCount.description: Number of payouts accepted into the batch

jobId.description: Async job ID — useful for log correlation

PayoutBatchResponse.description: Acknowledgement after a payout batch is queued for async processing

reason.example: Buyer requested cancellation; product not yet shipped

RefundOrderRequest.description: Refund authorization. Reason is recorded in audit_logs.

TotpCodeRequest.description: TOTP code submission. 6 digits = standard code; 8 digits = recovery code.

valid.description: True if the code is currently valid

TotpVerifyResponse.description: Result of a TOTP code verification (no side effects)

qrCodeDataUri.description: Inline data-URI PNG of the QR code (scan in Authy/Google Authenticator)

secretBase32.description: Base32-encoded TOTP secret — for manual entry as fallback

recoveryCodes.description: One-time recovery codes (10 codes; store offline)

items.description: One-time recovery codes (10 codes; store offline)

TotpEnrollResponse.description: TOTP enrollment payload — contains the QR code, raw secret, and recovery codes

totalNetEarned.description: Sum of SUCCESS-status net payouts (already on parent's card)

pendingApproved.description: APPROVED + PROCESSING net amount (awaiting admin payout execution)

FinanceSummaryDto.description: Student earnings dashboard — all amounts in UAH (DECIMAL(10,2))

AuthorDto.description: Public author info — first name and grade only (no last name to protect minors)

thumbnailUrl.description: Primary image URL (or null if none)

ProductCardDto.description: Compact product card for catalog list views (Redis-cached for 5 min)

ProductDetailDto.description: Full product details for the product page

KycSessionResponse.description: Magic-link session preview shown to the parent before they submit data

bearerAuth.description: JWT access token. Obtain via `POST /api/v1/auth/login` and supply as `Authorization: Bearer <token>`.
